Home.heroTitle: Practical analysis of AI systems, search visibility, and modern web execution.
Home.heroBody: ToLearn publishes clear, signal-first breakdowns for people building products on the web, from coding agents and AI workflows to search strategy and technical execution.
Home.stats: {posts} published posts · {hubs} topic hubs · Weekly analysis, not filler
Home.builtForTitle: Builders who need clearer thinking before they ship.
Home.builtForBody: Read for architecture patterns, search changes, and implementation notes you can actually use.
Home.useOne: Start with three core entry points
Home.useTwo: Follow guided paths through topic hubs
Home.useThree: Scan the latest dispatches in the journal
Home.startTitle: The clearest way into the site
Home.startBody: New to ToLearn? Begin with a few entry points that show how the site thinks about AI systems, search visibility, and practical execution.
Home.tracksTitle: Follow the part of the archive that matches your work
Home.tracksBody: Choose the lane you care about instead of scanning the archive cold.
Home.guidedTitle: Curated topic hubs for readers who want structure
Home.guidedBody: Follow a path instead of browsing the archive blind.
Home.whyBody: ToLearn is a running notebook for builders who care more about signal than hype. The goal is simple: make product shifts, technical decisions, and execution patterns easier to understand without turning every post into noise.
Home.latestBody: The newest analysis across AI systems, search visibility, and modern web execution.

Blog.title: Journal
Blog.intro: Every article in one place, filtered for fast browsing. This is where the broader archive lives after the curated homepage selections.
Blog.entryBody: Use the strongest entry points first, then come back here when you want the full stream of posts.
Blog.startEssentialsBody: Three curated entry points that explain the site's AI, search, and web lanes.
Blog.browseHubsBody: Follow guided paths through the archive instead of reading in timestamp order.
Blog.readGuidesBody: Use the most structured layer when you want step-by-step learning, not just posts.
Blog.filterTitle: Narrow the archive without losing context
Blog.filterBody: Filter by topic or search by title and summary. The archive stays readable even when the result set gets small.

SearchPage.title: Search the archive
SearchPage.intro: Search runs across titles, summaries, and full article content so you can recover a post from a phrase, concept, or name you only half remember.
SearchPage.readyTitle: Start from the search button in the header
SearchPage.readyBody: Use the site search to open this page with a query, or jump straight into the archive if you want to browse by recency.
SearchPage.noMatchBody: Try a shorter phrase, a product name, or a broader topic like AI agents, search, or Next.js.
